name: @ottabase/scripts
description: Utility scripts for Ottabase monorepo - schema generation, migrations, and CLI tools

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/schema/concatenate.ts src/migrations/runner.ts src/migrations/d1-executor.ts src/cli/db-generate.ts src/cli/db-migrate.ts src/cli/db-migrate-apply.ts src/cli/db-migrate-status.ts src/cli/cloudflare-setup.ts src/cli/cloudflare-validate.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --clean
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts src/schema/concatenate.ts src/migrations/runner.ts src/migrations/d1-executor.ts src/cli/db-generate.ts src/cli/db-migrate.ts src/cli/db-migrate-apply.ts src/cli/db-migrate-status.ts src/cli/cloudflare-setup.ts src/cli/cloudflare-validate.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --watch
